<a id="class-videostreamtheora"></a>

# VideoStreamTheora

**Inherits:** [VideoStream](class_videostream.md#class-videostream) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

[VideoStream](class_videostream.md#class-videostream) resource for Ogg Theora videos.

## Description

[VideoStream](class_videostream.md#class-videostream) resource handling the [Ogg Theora](https://www.theora.org/) video format with `.ogv` extension. The Theora codec is decoded on the CPU.

**Note:** While Ogg Theora videos can also have a `.ogg` extension, you will have to rename the extension to `.ogv` to use those videos within Godot.
